# Product Cost Security

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:eb538b091f6d9f6beeb0d517c644253123687ce7411fb7da87cc99806a7a3e97

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Adds a security group for product cost price field.
Only users with this group can view this field.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

To use this module you need to:

1. Go to a *Setting > Users and Companies > Users*.
2. Select a user and add "Access to product costs" group.

## Usage

To use this module you need to:

1. Go to product form view logged with this user and you will see the
   standard_price field.

## Bug Tracker
